problem id: bb0abecc
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(7) XOR SHR(4)) AND ROT(3)

examples:
  11100101 -> 00001110
  11111111 -> 10001111
  01110011 -> 10000011
  00100110 -> 00000000
  00010100 -> 00000000
  11100110 -> 00000110
  00110101 -> 10000001
  11110110 -> 00000111

query: 01101001
predicted answer: 00000010
